authors.author: Francis Rous
Jessie Seymour Irvine
Der Herr, mein Hirte, führet mich (Psalm 23)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Lord's my shepherd I'll not want He makes me lie in pastures green He leads me by the still, still waters His goodness restores my soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will trust in you alone. And I will trust in you alone. For your endless mercy follows me Your goodness will lead me home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He guides my ways in righteousness And he anoints my head with oil And my cup, it overflows with joy I feast on his pure delights.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And though I walk the darkest path I will not fear the evil one For you are with me, and your rod and staff Are the comfort I need to know.
